description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On August 10, 2025 at 2:23 AM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in San Francisco, California was in a 
collision involving a passenger car on Mission Street near Angelo’s Alley.  
 
The Waymo AV was traveling northeastbound in the left lane on Mission Street with its left turn signal activated, preparing to turn left into 
a parking garage located at 1160 Mission Street. Before the Waymo AV could initiate the left turn, the Waymo AV slowed to a stop within 
the left lane to yield to a scooterist that was traveling southwestbound on the sidewalk across the entrance of the parking garage. While the 
Waymo AV was stopped, a passenger car approached the Waymo AV from behind and the front of the passenger car made contact with the 
rear of the Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. Both vehicles 
sustained damage. 
Print
Clear Form
